label: Auroral Sill Chamber
description: Auroral Sill Chamber is a narrow sleeping room aligned to Suturesill House’s axial reflections, its laminar mirror-slag walls extending the escarpment city’s calibrated sightlines into the private interior. A recessed sill-window, framed in seam-grooved basalt glass, admits Lacrymara’s copper-white twilight in fixed bands that register along inlaid floor lines. Electrostatic baffles at the vent grilles pin charged glass dust into deliberate filigree over the lintels, preserving the room’s surfaces as reflective instruments rather than worn finishes. Built-in berth and storage niches are cut flush to the wall planes, maintaining an uncluttered geometry suitable to the house’s optical discipline.
